data.raceComments: {"comment":"3. JAGGERY is a capable type and proved too strong last time to win by 2 lengths at this track in a handy 23.95 beating Jester Beach. Recorded one of the quickest times on the card in scoring last start. Expected to be right there at the finish again. 2. WAKA WAKA slotted in just off the lead from the wide box before lifting strongly to score (24.00) at this track in a P5 over 407m. Remains without a win from the draw but has been in the placings three times from six attempts. Sure to be thereabouts. 1. MR. WILLIAMS led throughout to score two back then drifted back and missed the frame latest finishing a 5.5 lengths 5th at this track (24.17). Has the ability to give this a shake. 7. SPIKE MILLINGTON is one of the chances after collecting a minor prize last time.","runners":[3,2,7],"exclusive":false}
